firstEvidence: AuditLog minimal seed (in-memory, append-only, deterministic timestamps via injected clock)
gates: v1-v4 evidence gaps must remain explicit before v5/v6 implementation starts
default registry must remain coding plus Code Intel essentials unless a later explicit release gate changes it
Gate-1 preferred-100k, Gate-1.5, and production long-horizon evidence must not be inferred from fixture/module existence
v5.0 implementation allowed only when v1-v4 scorecard aggregate >= 65% AND v2.5 percent >= 65%

gateStatus.note: BOTH gates reached 2026-06-10: v1-v4 aggregate 65% (D-86) AND v2.5 65% (D-82). v5.0 implementation is now UNLOCKED. Implementation remains gated only on explicit user kickoff direction (the v5 plan doc lists the v5.0 themes: production hardening, plugin governance, distribution/upgrade flow, observability/auditability).

phases.name: Production Hardening And Distribution
evidence: D-87 (AuditLog minimal seed): in-memory, append-only, deterministic timestamps via injected clock
D-88 (AuditLog wired into runToolLoop): 3 emit points (tool-call, tool-result, loop-end) with optional auditLog parameter; first v5.0 sub-sprint to modify a 5 红线 file (additive, optional)
D-89 (AuditLog file-backed persistence): PersistingAuditLog extends AuditLog with JSONL atomic write + partial-line recovery; cross-instance fixture present (mirror D-78 + D-80 pattern)
D-90 (AuditLog reader): standalone async readAuditLog function with partial-line recovery + ENOENT handling; completes the v5 observability quartet (write D-87/88/89 + read D-90)

D-91 (Plugin governance minimal seed): ToolCapability type + toolCapabilities helper + isToolCapability type guard + 3 unit tests. Optional capabilities field on Tool (additive, backward-compatible). The plugin-governance theme starts here.

D-92 (Plugin governance 2nd evidence: default tool capability backfill): all 19 default tools now declare accurate capabilities; 2 new unit tests verify completeness + accuracy. Plugin-governance theme now has real evidence (vocabulary D-91 + actual usage D-92).

D-93 (Plugin governance 3rd evidence: ToolRegistry.listByCapability): registry-level filter composes D-91 toolCapabilities helper with existing list(); 3 new unit tests assert correct subset for shell-exec / code-execute / file-write. Plugin-governance theme 1st cycle complete (vocabulary + actual usage + query).

D-94 (Distribution/upgrade flow 1st evidence: DistributionManifest): typed single-source-of-truth constant + structural validator + 3 unit tests. The 3rd v5.0 theme (distribution/upgrade flow) starts here; future D-95+ can build on this manifest (upgrade check, capability matrix, changelog generator).

D-95 (Distribution/upgrade flow 2nd evidence: compareVersions): pure upgrade-check function + UpgradeCheckResult type + UpgradeSeverity union + 4 unit tests. The 2nd evidence piece of the theme; D-94 + D-95 form the distribution/upgrade flow 1st cycle (manifest description + upgrade decision).

D-96 (Production hardening 1st evidence: fatal-error formatter): formatFatalError pure defensive formatter + recordFatalEvent cross-theme bridge into v5.0 AuditLog (D-87) + FatalErrorEvent interface + 4 unit tests. The 4th and final v5.0 theme (production hardening) starts here; future D-97+ can build on this formatter (SIGINT/SIGTERM handler, uncaught exception hook, graceful shutdown sequence).

D-97 (Production hardening 2nd evidence: installSignalHandlers): SIGINT + SIGTERM wired to v5.0 AuditLog via 'fatal-signal' events, idempotent cleanup, optional onSignal callback. Production-hardening 1st cycle complete (format D-96 + handle D-97).

D-98 (Production hardening 3rd evidence: installProcessUncaughtHandlers): uncaughtException + unhandledRejection wired to v5.0 AuditLog via 'fatal-uncaught' events, idempotent cleanup, optional onUncaught callback (default process.exit(1) for non-zero failure exit). Production-hardening 3-event taxonomy: format D-96 + signal D-97 + uncaught D-98.

D-99 (Production hardening 4th evidence: gracefulShutdown): 3-step sequence (beforeExit -> auditLog record -> onComplete) with full defensive error handling; 'graceful-shutdown' events into v5.0 AuditLog; ShutdownResult returns beforeExitInvoked/onCompleteInvoked flags. Production-hardening 4-step protocol COMPLETE: format D-96 + signal D-97 + uncaught D-98 + drain D-99.

D-100 (Plugin governance 2nd cycle: buildCapabilityMatrix): cross-theme bridge between D-91 ToolCapability vocabulary and D-94 DistributionManifest; pure function returning CapabilityMatrix with entries (capability -> providers + declared), undeclaredToolCapabilities (drift signal), and toolsWithoutCapabilities (legacy detection). Plugin-governance theme 1st cycle COMPLETE: vocabulary D-91 + usage D-92 + query D-93 + cross-theme bridge D-100.

D-101 (Distribution/upgrade flow 2nd cycle: generateChangelog): pure function comparing 2 DistributionManifests; returns ChangelogDocument with structured entries (version + capability-added/removed + channel + node-engine + supported-upgrade-origin). Distribution/upgrade flow theme 2nd cycle COMPLETE: manifest D-94 + compareVersions D-95 + changelog generator D-101.

D-102 (Observability+auditability 2nd cycle: dumpAuditLog): async function reading via D-90 readAuditLog + applying eventKinds/sinceTimestamp filters + rendering text or JSON output. Observability+auditability theme 2nd cycle COMPLETE: write D-87/88/89 + read D-90 + render D-102.

D-103 (Plugin governance 2nd cycle: enforceProfilePolicy): pure function reusing D-100 buildCapabilityMatrix + emitting undeclared-capability + missing-capability violations. Plugin-governance theme 2nd cycle COMPLETE: vocabulary D-91 + usage D-92 + query D-93 + cross-theme bridge D-100 + enforcement D-103.

D-104 (Production hardening 5th evidence: evaluateCrossInstanceRollback): async function reading via D-90 readAuditLog + checking last event kind + freshness window; emits proceed / rollback / no-evidence decision. Production-hardening 5-evidence set COMPLETE: format D-96 + signal D-97 + uncaught D-98 + drain D-99 + cross-instance recovery D-104.

D-105 (Cross-theme bridge: buildPolicySnapshot): async orchestration layer reusing D-100 buildCapabilityMatrix + D-101 generateChangelog + D-103 enforceProfilePolicy + D-104 evaluateCrossInstanceRollback; returns PolicySnapshot with capabilityMatrix + changelog + policyEnforcement + crossInstance + summary. v5.0 3-theme cross-bridge COMPLETE: plugin governance + distribution/upgrade + production hardening tied into 1 unified status struct.

D-106 (v6.0 master plan): docs/superpowers/v6.0-master-plan.md with 4 themes (multi-agent safety + hosted/enterprise opt-in gates + distributed cross-instance coordination + advanced observability), entry criteria checklist (5/6 prereqs checked), and first sub-sprint design (multi-agent safety seed). v6.0 plan promoted from 'planning preview only' to 'executable plan'.

D-107 (v6.0 multi-agent safety seed part 1: registerSubAgent): SubAgentId branded type + SubAgent interface + SubAgentRegistry class (in-memory map-based, register/unregister/get/list/listByParent/size/clear + asSubAgentId + isSubAgentId helpers). v6.0 Theme 1 (multi-agent safety) 1st-cycle seed start. D-108 + D-109 will add enforceSubAgentPolicy and rollbackSubAgent.
entryCriteria: v1-v4 scorecard has explicit evidence for remaining gate gaps
Gate-1 preferred or blocker is freshly documented
Gate-1.5 and Gate-2 interpretations remain honest

phases.name: Collaborative Agent Operations
entryCriteria: v5 production hardening has shipped with verification evidence
multi-agent safety, audit, and rollback policies are tested
hosted or enterprise surfaces have explicit opt-in and policy gates
